name: agency-dashboard
description: Multi-agent orchestration dashboard for the agency-agents-zh team — drives claude CLI via OAuth subscription.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run check
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
